VERIFICATION

Verification is intended to assist maintainers and reviewers in verifying that the bundled NSSM binary is trustworthy.

Bundled component: NSSM - the Non-Sucking Service Manager
Pinned package version: 2.24.101.20180116
Pinned upstream archive: https://www.nssm.cc/ci/nssm-2.24-101-g897c7ad.zip
Pinned checksum type: SHA256
Pinned checksum: 99F5045FFFBFFB745D67FE3A065A953C4A3D9C253B868892D9B685B0EE7D07B8
Bundled binary path inside the Windows worker package: tools/nssm/nssm.exe

How to verify manually:
1. Download the upstream archive from the pinned URL above.
2. Compute the SHA256 checksum using Get-FileHash or another trusted checksum tool.
3. Confirm the checksum matches the pinned value in this file.
4. Extract the archive and verify the bundled binary comes from `win64/nssm.exe`.

License archive source:
- This LICENSE.txt is archived from the Chocolatey community package source for NSSM.
- Source reference: https://github.com/chocolatey-community/chocolatey-packages/tree/main/automatic/nssm/legal/License.txt
